hero.title: Word Markdown Companion
hero.copy: Handle .md import, formatting, and export directly inside Word.

import.title: Import Markdown
import.summary: Bring local Markdown into the current Word document or continue with content handed over by the launcher.

export.title: Export Markdown
export.summary: Generate Markdown from the current document, review it first, then download when it looks right.

format.title: Format Document
format.summary: Apply Word formatting to plain Markdown text and handle launcher-provided content in the same workspace.

import.dropzoneBody: You can also choose a local Markdown file with the button above.
import.helper: Supports .md / .markdown; content will be inserted at the current cursor position.

export.helper: If the document is empty, both the preview and download output will be empty.

format.lead: Turn plain Markdown symbols in the document into Word formatting, or process content handed over by the launcher.
format.helper: Best for plain-text Markdown documents that were just opened or when you want to re-apply this project's conversion rules.

reference.title: Format conversion reference
reference.summary: A quick reference for the common Markdown and Word mappings used by this project.

structure.title: Structure and headings
structure.item1: # through ###### map to Word Heading 1 through Heading 6
structure.item2: Regular paragraphs stay as standard body paragraphs
structure.item3: Blank lines split into new Word paragraphs

links.title: Links and export
links.item2: Export uses Turndown rules to convert content back to Markdown

status.ready: Ready. Import, export, or format Markdown from the same workspace.
status.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
status.officeNotReady: Office.js has not finished loading. Confirm the task pane can reach the Microsoft-hosted office.js runtime.
status.officeUnavailable: Office.context is unavailable. Open this inside a Word task pane.
status.downloadReady: Export complete. You can now download the Markdown file.
status.documentEmpty: The document is empty, so there is nothing to export.
status.formattingExistingDocument: Formatting the current document based on its Markdown text…
status.pendingFileMissing: There is no pending Markdown file to import.
status.pendingImportSuccess: Imported the Markdown file that was just opened.
status.fileReadFailed: The file could not be read.
status.pendingImportDetected: Pending Markdown content was detected. Use the action button to insert it into the current document.
status.pendingImportedFile: Detected Markdown handed over by the launcher: {fileName}
status.pendingImportedGeneric: Detected Markdown handed over by the launcher.
status.markdownDocumentDetected: A Markdown document was detected. Click to convert the current plain text into Word formatting.
status.noConvertibleContent: There is currently no content that can be converted.
status.formatSuccess: The current document was reformatted using Markdown rules.
status.cannotReadPending: Unable to read the pending Markdown file.
status.saveAutoShowFailed: Unable to save the auto-show taskpane setting.
